final_choice.row_label: Shareholders equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Using parent-attributable equity first to exclude non-controlling interests. Total shareholders equity is fallback only.

candidates.why: Minority interest label exists, but it is on the income statement and appears unpopulated; MIB is ideally a balance sheet NCI line.

variables.notes: No explicit balance-sheet non-controlling interest/minority interest row is provided. Since BE uses parent-attributable equity, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
